mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, session_id, model_registry_id, provider, request_id, input_digest, output_digest, latency_ms, token_in, token_out, cost_amount, status, error_message, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO model_invocation_log ( tenant_id, session_id, model_registry_id, provider, request_id, input_digest, output_digest, latency_ms, token_in, token_out, cost_amount, status, error_message ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{sessionId}, #{modelRegistryId}, #{provider}, #{requestId}, #{inputDigest}, #{outputDigest}, #{latencyMs}, #{tokenIn}, #{tokenOut}, #{costAmount}, #{status}, #{errorMessage} )
